message:
feat(benchmarks): Add memory benchmark implementation

Implement pure-Rust memory benchmark measuring worker memory subsystem:
- Sequential bandwidth: 256MB buffer read/write throughput (GB/s)
- Random access latency: pointer chasing through shuffled array (ns)
- Allocation throughput: Vec allocation stress test (ops/sec)
- Weighted score calculation (60% bandwidth, 25% latency, 15% alloc)
- Builder pattern for configurable parameters
- run() and run_stable() methods for consistent API

Add 16 unit tests with detailed tracing logs following cpu.rs pattern.
All 69 rch-telemetry tests pass.

Closes remote_compilation_helper-cdw

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
